name: ml-intern
description:
Star


  

  
    
    


      
        huggingface /

      ml-intern  

    
      🤗 ml-intern: an open-source ML engineer that reads papers, trains models, and ships ML models
summary: 🤗 ml-intern 是一个开源机器学习工程师项目，能自动阅读论文、训练模型并部署机器学习模型，值得关注因为它实现了ML流程的自动化。

name: RAG-Anything
description:
Star


  

  
    
    


      
        HKUDS /

      RAG-Anything  

    
      "RAG-Anything: All-in-One RAG Framework"
summary: "RAG-Anything是一个多功能的一体化RAG（检索增强生成）框架，值得关注因为它整合了多种检索与生成技术，简化了开发流程。"

name: Open-Generative-AI
description:
Star


  

  
    
    


      
        Anil-matcha /

      Open-Generative-AI  

    
      Uncensored, open-source alternative to Higgsfield AI, Freepik, Krea, Openart AI — Free, unrestricted AI image & video generation studio with 200+ models (Flux, Midjourney, Kling, Sora, Veo). No content filters. Self-hosted, MIT licensed.
summary: Open-Generative-AI 是一个开源、无审查的生成式AI平台，提供200多种图像和视频模型（如Midjourney、Sora等），支持自托管且完全免费，适合需要无限制内容创作的用户。

name: ai-agents-for-beginners
description:
Star


  

  
    
    


      
        microsoft /

      ai-agents-for-beginners  

    
      12 Lessons to Get Started Building AI Agents
summary: 该项目是微软推出的12节入门教程，通过Jupyter Notebook教学帮助初学者学习构建AI代理的基础知识，值得关注因为它提供了系统化的实践指导且由微软官方维护。

name: cline
description:
Star


  

  
    
    


      
        cline /

      cline  

    
      Autonomous coding agent right in your IDE, capable of creating/editing files, executing commands, using the browser, and more with your permission every step of the way.
summary: cline/cline 是一个运行在 IDE 中的自主编程助手，能够在你逐步授权下创建/编辑文件、执行命令、使用浏览器等操作，值得关注因为它将 AI 编程代理深度集成到开发环境，实现安全可控的自动化辅助。

name: onnxruntime
description:
Star


  

  
    
    


      
        microsoft /

      onnxruntime  

    
      ONNX Runtime: cross-platform, high performance ML inferencing and training accelerator
summary: ONNX Runtime 是一个跨平台的高性能机器学习推理和训练加速器，由微软开发，支持多种硬件和框架，值得关注因其高效优化和广泛兼容性。

name: aie-book
description:
Star


  

  
    
    


      
        chiphuyen /

      aie-book  

    
      [WIP] Resources for AI engineers. Also contains supporting materials for the book AI Engineering (Chip Huyen, 2025)
summary: 该项目是AI工程师的学习资源库，包含支持《AI工程》书籍的材料，值得关注因其为AI实践提供实用指南和最新工具。

name: RuView
description:
Star


  

  
    
    


      
        ruvnet /

      RuView  

    
      π RuView: WiFi DensePose turns commodity WiFi signals into real-time human pose estimation, vital sign monitoring, and presence detection — all without a single pixel of video.
summary: RuView利用WiFi信号实现实时人体姿态估计、生命体征监测和存在检测，无需摄像头，隐私保护且成本低廉。
